subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Reflect upon the grace and bounty of the True One, glorified be His glory. He hath confirmed thee and bestowed upon thee His favor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله در فضل و عنایت حق جل جلاله تفکر نما ترا تایید نمود و توفیق عطا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @chastity and purity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
